HEROKU_APP_NAME.description: The name of this Heroku app the one you entered at the top. Required if you want to use .update/.updatenow.

SESSION_ID.description: Your WhatsApp session string, generated at https://kingpin-sjlx.onrender.com (QR CODE or PAIR CODE)

OWNER_NAME.description: Your name, shown in bot info/menu

OWNER_NUMBER.description: Your WhatsApp number with country code, no + or spaces (e.g. 254754574642)

HEROKU_API_KEY.description: Your Heroku account API key (dashboard.heroku.com/account → API Key). Required if you want to use .update/.updatenow to check and trigger redeploys from WhatsApp.

STICKER_NAME.description: Pack name used on stickers created by the bot

PUBLIC_MODE.description: If true, anyone can use commands. If false, only the owner can (true/false)
